description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a wide driveway, a garage, and a formal entryway flanked by two tall, manicured trees. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, a shaded pergola, and a patio area surrounded by lush landscaping and palm trees. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The property is enclosed by a low stone wall and fencing, with green lawns and decorative shrubs on all sides. A detached, irregularly shaped pool or water feature is visible adjacent to the main lot.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by fencing and features both formal and recreational spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and two tall trees flanking the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the backyard pool area with patio furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, pergola, palm trees, and sliding glass doors opening to the patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional landscaping, and the detached pool or water feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Formal entry with a wide door, flanked by tall trees, accessed via a paved walkway and steps, no porch or overhang.
